Term Sheet — Strategic Equity and CB Investment in Seonghae Microsystems Co., Ltd. (KR issuer) — draft for FSC/FSS review and KRX listing committee consideration.
Issuer: Seonghae Microsystems Co., Ltd.; Company BRN (사업자등록번호): 713-84-20957 (S e o n g r i m Tax O f f i c e); Registered Address: 12F, Namgye Plaza, Songrim-dong, Seongrim-si, Gyeonggi-do 17400.
Investor: Crescent Capital Partners L.P.; Contact: Ms. Hana Jang, IR Lead; email: h.jang@crescentcap.co.kr; phone: +82-10-8455-0032.
Transaction: Purchase of 8,200,000 common shares and KRW 40,000,000,000 convertible bonds at KRW 4,880 per share, subject to FSCMA compliance and KRX consent; closing conditions apply.
Use of proceeds: expansion of Aurora-Line batteries (product name), working capital; no change to employment terms; Compliance Officer (role-only) to monitor KR labor law impacts.
Bank details for Closing: Gyeongcheon Bank account 452-771-009312 (beneficiary: Seonghae Microsystems); SWFT: GCBKKR22 (label only, not an actual SWIFT).
Key Person: Mr. Joon-ki Ryu (CTO); Resident registration no.: 920101-1 23 4567 (invalid checksum, HR onboarding mockup only, not for DART filing); KR passport: AL7902331 (fictional); home office: 17-2 Baekchon-gil, Seongrim-si, Gyeonggi-do 17402.
Regulatory filings: FSC/FSS pre-review, DART submission before Closing; information herein constitutes MNPI until posted on DART and acknowledged by KRX.
No MAC: no material adverse change shall be deemed to have occurred prior to Closing except for general market movements; standard carve-outs apply.
IR protocol: investor-relations URL https://lantern-ir.kr/deal/SEON-2026?rid=ACQ-04&contact=ms.jang%40crescentcap.co.kr; no open posting prior to KRX acknowledgment.
Misc: local tax clearance letter required from Seongrim Tax Office; Corporate Registry extract to show company number KRCORP-00931-SSM; obfuscated BRN reprint: 7 13-8 4-20 957 (OCR variation).
Placeholders not identifiers: Form field “TAX ID: 000-00-00000”, Public Helpdesk 1555 (general inquiries only), and generic email info@issuer.co.kr (not monitored).
Public-source references: any mention of publicly available product specs or market commentary does not constitute MNPI and may be shared post-DART.
Contacts (OCR test): h . j a n g @ c r e s c e n t c a p . c o . k r; tel + 82 - 10 - 84 55 - 0032; alt: +82-2-000-0000 (template switchboard).
next steps: finalize sa, compile dd pack, route approvals, schedule board mtg; target signing by 2026-07-15.
